scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:deploy: pnpm run typecheck:deploy && pnpm --filter @workspace/broker-tenant-onboarding run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/tenant-document-upload run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/tenant-workflow run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/trustkeyper run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.build:vercel-deploy: pnpm run typecheck:deploy && pnpm --filter @workspace/broker-tenant-onboarding run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/tenant-document-upload run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/tenant-workflow run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && node scripts/build-vercel-output.mjs
scripts.test:db:dev: node scripts/test-sandbox.mjs info && dotenv -e .env.test-sandbox -- concurrently -k -n api,web "cross-env PORT=8080 pnpm run dev:api" "cross-env WEB_PORT=5173 pnpm --filter @workspace/trustkeyper run dev"
scripts.dev:file: concurrently -k -n api,web "cross-env PORT=8080 NODE_ENV=development pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/trustkeyper run dev"
scripts.dev:local: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && pnpm run db:push && concurrently -k -n api,web "cross-env PORT=8080 pnpm run dev:api" "cross-env WEB_PORT=5173 pnpm --filter @workspace/trustkeyper run dev"
scripts.dev:local:docker: node scripts/ensure-env.mjs && pnpm run db:up && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://trustkeyper:trustkeyper@localhost:5432/trustkeyper_dev pnpm run db:push && concurrently -k -n api,web "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm --filter @workspace/trustkeyper run dev"
scripts.typecheck:deploy: pnpm run check:drizzle-singleton && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm run typecheck:api && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:deploy && pnpm --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test:run: pnpm --filter @workspace/trustkeyper run test:run && pnpm --filter @workspace/website run test:run
